_convention: Skill Engine constants per Phase 3 spec. BP scale (10000=100%) per CLAUDE.md R30. Suffix _BP cho ratio, _TURNS cho turn count, _MS cho millisecond, _SEC cho second, no suffix integer absolute.
_decoded_from_ts_online: TURN_DELAY_MS=1200 verified BattleManager.cs:23 + Main.unity:494. Turn duration spec: PvE=15s, Boss=20s, PvP=12s match TS round (10 entity × 1.2s = 12s) + thinking buffer.
_anim_note: ANIM_FRAME_RATE=30 modern SVTK (TS gốc 4 FPS chỉ tham khảo, quá retro cho mobile 2026). TURN_DELAY_MS=1200 giữ TS pacing.
